name: Stuffed Zucchini
recipeIngredient: 2 large zucchini, cut in half lengthwise and the center scooped out (leave a shell)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the center of the zucchini shells and chop the insides.
2. In a non-stick skillet, sauté the chopped onion until softened.
3. Add marjoram and basil to the onions and cook for a few minutes.
4. Add the chopped jalapeno peppers (if using) and continue cooking until all ingredients are tender.
5. In a large pot, combine grated carrots, red lentils, boiling water, and bulgar wheat. Simmer for 15 minutes.
6. Stir in bulgar wheat and cook for an additional 10-15 minutes.
7. Season with salt to taste.
8. Mix the cooked zucchini filling with cheddar cheese (if using).
9. Stuff the prepared zucchini shells with the mixture, mounding slightly.
10. In a baking dish, prepare the sauce with crushed tomatoes, minced garlic, marjoram, basil, chili powder, and black pepper.
11. Spoon the sauce over the stuffed zucchini shells.
12. Bake in a 350°F oven for 45 minutes or microwave covered with wax paper for about 20 minutes.
